subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of Truth and companions of God! This is the morn of Ramadan, the time for fasting by day and vigilance by night, amidst myriad hardships [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران حق و دوستان الهی صبح رمضان است و روزه روز و بیداری شبانست صد هزار کلفت
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
